  cluster:
    id:     abc1234
    health: HEALTH_ERR

  services:
    mon: 3 daemons, quorum a,b,c (age 2w)
    mgr: a(active, since 2w)
    osd: 9 osds: 9 up (since 2w), 9 in (since 2w)

    pools:   18 pools, 289 pgs
    objects: 2.50M objects, 1.6T
    usage:   3.2T used, 6.8T / 10T avail
    pgs:     289 active+clean

    client:   120 B/s rd, 240 B/s wr, 8 op/s rd, 16 op/s wr
